metadata.raw_text: {"scores":{"clarity":5,"simplicity":4,"brevity_economy":4,"structure_flow":5,"specificity_precision":4,"humanity_voice":5,"overall":4},"rationale":"Clear, well-organized explainer with an approachable homeowner-focused voice and useful concrete details. It loses a bit on simplicity and economy because of some hypey phrasing and extra flourish, and on precision because a few claims are broad or somewhat overstated (for example bill savings and incentives)."}

rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer with an approachable homeowner-focused voice and useful concrete details. It loses a bit on simplicity and economy because of some hypey phrasing and extra flourish, and on precision because a few claims are broad or somewhat overstated (for example bill savings and incentives).
